stage.subtitle_ar: أساس كل عمل ناجح: تحية صادقة، وسعر واضح، وموعد مضبوط — ابدأ إنجليزيتك من هنا.

content.intro_ar: أول كلمة يسمعها العميل منك تصنع انطباعه عن عملك كله. في هذا الدرس تتعلم كيف تحيّي عملاءك وموظفيك بالإنجليزية، وكيف تقدّم نفسك بثقة كصاحب عمل. عبارات قصيرة وبسيطة، لكنها تفتح أبواباً كثيرة.

vocab.meaning_en: a friendly word when you see someone
a greeting you say in the morning
a warm word for a guest or a customer
a person who buys from you
vocab.example: A new customer comes in the morning.

vocab.meaning_en: the person who has the business
vocab.example: I am the owner of this workshop.

vocab.meaning_en: a place where you fix cars
what people call you
to see someone for the first time
to do something good for someone
the work you do to make money
a person who works for you
kind words you say after help
vocab.example: Thank you for your good work.

paragraphs: My name is Dhafer. I am the owner of a car workshop in the industrial area. Every morning, I open the workshop at eight. I say good morning to my workers. A good day starts with a warm hello.
At nine, a customer comes in. I smile and say, "Good morning! Welcome to our workshop. How can I help you?" The customer says his car makes a strange sound. I say, "No problem. We can help you."
The customer's name is Mr. Salem. He is new here. I say, "Nice to meet you, Mr. Salem." He is happy because we are friendly. In business, a warm welcome is very important. Happy customers come back.
At the end of the day, I thank my workers. I say, "Thank you for your good work. See you tomorrow." Then I close the workshop and go home.

key_phrases.en: Good morning! Welcome to our workshop.
key_phrases.ar: صباح الخير! أهلاً بك في ورشتنا.

key_phrases.en: My name is Dhafer. I am the owner.
Thank you for coming. See you soon.

comprehension.question: What does Dhafer open at eight?
comprehension.explanation_ar: تقول القصة: أفتح الورشة الساعة الثامنة كل صباح.

comprehension.question: What does Dhafer say to the customer?
comprehension.explanation_ar: يرحّب ظافر بالعميل ثم يسأله: How can I help you? — كيف يمكنني مساعدتك؟

comprehension.question: What is the customer's name?
comprehension.explanation_ar: اسم العميل الجديد هو السيد سالم (Mr. Salem).

comprehension.question: Why is a warm welcome important in business?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الترحيب الحار مهم لأن العميل السعيد يعود إلى الورشة مرة أخرى.

comprehension.question: When does Dhafer thank his workers?
options: At the end of the day
comprehension.correct: At the end of the day
comprehension.explanation_ar: في نهاية اليوم يشكر ظافر عمّاله على عملهم الجيد.

task.prompt_en: Introduce yourself in English: say your name, your work, and welcome a customer to your workshop.
task.prompt_ar: قدّم نفسك بالإنجليزية: قل اسمك وعملك، ثم رحّب بعميل في ورشتك.
task.guidance_ar: استخدم ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، وتحدّث بصوت واضح وهادئ.

content.intro_ar: الأرقام والأسعار هي لغة يومك: فاتورة، وعرض سعر، وخصم لعميل دائم. في هذا الدرس تتعلم كيف تقول الأسعار بالريال بالإنجليزية، وكيف تجيب بثقة عندما يسألك العميل: How much?

vocab.meaning_en: a word like one, two, three
the money you ask for something
the money of Saudi Arabia
the money you pay for something
to give money for something
with a low price
with a high price
all the money together
vocab.example: The total is four hundred riyals.

vocab.meaning_en: money you take off the price
the number 100
putting new oil in the car
vocab.example: The oil change takes one hour.

vocab.meaning_en: a question about the price

paragraphs: Numbers are very important in my work. Every day, customers ask me about prices. They say, "How much is this?" I always give a clear answer. A clear price makes the customer happy.

Today, a customer wants an oil change. He asks, "How much does it cost?" I say, "The oil change is one hundred and fifty riyals." He says, "That is not expensive. It is a good price." He is happy because it is cheap.

The customer also wants new brake pads. The pads cost three hundred riyals. So the total is four hundred and fifty riyals. I give him a small discount of fifty riyals. Now he pays four hundred riyals only.
The customer smiles and says, "Thank you! This is a fair price." He pays with his card. Good prices and clear numbers bring customers back to my workshop.

key_phrases.en: The oil change is one hundred and fifty riyals.
The total is four hundred riyals.
I can give you a small discount.
You can pay by cash or card.

comprehension.question: How much is the oil change?
comprehension.explanation_ar: قال ظافر للعميل: تغيير الزيت بمئة وخمسين ريالاً.

comprehension.question: What is the total before the discount?
comprehension.explanation_ar: تغيير الزيت ١٥٠ ريالاً + فحمات الفرامل ٣٠٠ ريال = المجموع ٤٥٠ ريالاً قبل الخصم.

comprehension.question: How much is the discount?
comprehension.explanation_ar: أعطاه ظافر خصماً قدره خمسون ريالاً، فدفع ٤٠٠ ريال فقط.

comprehension.question: How does the customer pay?
comprehension.explanation_ar: في نهاية القصة: He pays with his card — دفع العميل بالبطاقة.

comprehension.question: What does "cheap" mean?
comprehension.explanation_ar: كلمة cheap تعني رخيصاً، أي أن السعر منخفض.

task.prompt_en: Write 3–4 sentences about prices in your workshop. Example: An oil change costs one hundred riyals.
task.prompt_ar: اكتب ٣–٤ جُمل عن الأسعار في ورشتك. مثال: تغيير الزيت يكلّف مئة ريال.
task.guidance_ar: اكتب الأرقام بالكلمات الإنجليزية، واستخدم ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس.

content.intro_ar: «موعدك يوم الثلاثاء الساعة العاشرة» — جملة تقولها كل يوم في عملك. في هذا الدرس تتعلم أيام الأسبوع والمواعيد بالإنجليزية، حتى تحدد لعملائك متى تكون الورشة مفتوحة ومتى تكون سياراتهم جاهزة.

vocab.meaning_en: 24 hours, like Sunday or Monday
seven days together
vocab.example: We work six days a week.

vocab.meaning_en: this day, now
the day after today
a fixed day and time to meet
vocab.example: I need an appointment for my car.

vocab.meaning_en: ready for work and customers
not open
finished and good to go
with a lot of work
hours and minutes
a rest day in Saudi Arabia
vocab.example: The workshop is closed on Friday.

vocab.meaning_en: the exact hour

paragraphs: My workshop is open six days a week. We work from Saturday to Thursday. On Friday, the workshop is closed. Friday is a day for family and rest.

Today is Sunday, and we are very busy. A customer calls me. He says, "I need an appointment for my car." I look at my book. I say, "We are busy today. Can you come tomorrow at ten o'clock?" He says, "Yes, that time is good for me."
On Monday, the customer comes at ten o'clock. He is on time. We check his car. I tell him, "Your car will be ready tomorrow at five o'clock." He says, "Great! See you tomorrow."
Appointments help my business a lot. With a clear day and time, the customer is happy, and my team is not too busy. A good plan makes work easy.

key_phrases.en: Can you come tomorrow at ten o'clock?
key_phrases.ar: هل تستطيع المجيء غداً الساعة العاشرة؟

key_phrases.en: Your car will be ready at five o'clock.
We are open from Saturday to Thursday.
The workshop is closed on Friday.
I am busy today, but tomorrow is good.
key_phrases.ar: أنا مشغول اليوم، لكن غداً مناسب.

comprehension.question: When is the workshop closed?
comprehension.explanation_ar: تقول القصة: الورشة مغلقة يوم الجمعة، فهو يوم للعائلة والراحة.

comprehension.question: What does the customer need?
comprehension.explanation_ar: اتصل العميل وقال: I need an appointment for my car — أحتاج موعداً لسيارتي.

comprehension.question: When does the customer come to the workshop?
comprehension.explanation_ar: اليوم الأحد، وطلب ظافر منه المجيء غداً — أي يوم الاثنين — الساعة العاشرة.

comprehension.question: When will the car be ready?
comprehension.explanation_ar: قال ظافر للعميل: سيارتك ستكون جاهزة غداً الساعة الخامسة.

comprehension.question: Why do appointments help the business?
options: The customer is happy and the team is not too busy
comprehension.correct: The customer is happy and the team is not too busy
comprehension.explanation_ar: المواعيد الواضحة تجعل العميل سعيداً والفريق غير مضغوطٍ بالعمل.

task.prompt_en: Write 3–4 sentences about your work week. When are you open? When are you busy?
task.prompt_ar: اكتب ٣–٤ جُمل عن أسبوع عملك: متى تفتح الورشة؟ ومتى تكون مشغولاً؟
task.guidance_ar: استخدم أسماء الأيام بالإنجليزية، و٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس.
